title: Add resumable Plan Snapshots
summary: EVE now gates snapshot-worthy work behind durable, resumable human-approved plans, evaluates implementation conformance, and exposes local approval and alignment surfaces.
userVisibleChange: Agents can declare resumable plans, humans can approve them in a native local queue, and completed Snapshots show plan alignment and scope drift.

risks.title: Trusted-local approval API assumes local processes are trusted

decisions.title: Make planRequestId the durable recovery primitive
Persist immutable locked revisions and evaluate conformance without blocking history

validation.output: All Go package tests passed, including Plan lifecycle, MCP, API/SSE, conformance, and schema compatibility coverage.
The command package passed under the race detector and Go vet completed without findings.

validation.command: npm test and npm run build in ui
validation.output: All 25 React tests passed and the production UI bundle built successfully.

validation.command: xcodebuild test and Release build for EVEApproval
validation.output: All 6 native tests passed and the macOS 13+ Release app target built successfully.
The complete implementation and generated Evolution record are whitespace-clean.
